project.name: IGPL Corporate Website v2
project.objective: Premium industrial corporate website for IG Petrochemicals Ltd. that serves customers, investors, prospective employees, and stakeholders while being search-visible and AI-retrievable.
success_criteria: A chemical buyer understands what IGPL makes and how to enquire within 10 seconds.
An investor sees category leadership, manufacturing depth, and governance seriousness immediately.
A candidate sees ambition and meaningful work, not generic HR copy.
The site feels like a market-leading industrial company, not a template.
Core messages are easy for search engines and AI assistants to extract accurately.

core_positioning.primary: IGPL is India's leading manufacturer of Phthalic Anhydride and a critical supplier to downstream plasticizers, coatings, resins, and specialty chemical value chains.
core_positioning.secondary: IGPL combines scale, process technology, operational experience, and strategic logistics to serve domestic and international customers.
core_positioning.future_facing: IGPL is positioned as a platform for disciplined downstream and specialty chemical growth.

design_system.brand_feel: premium industrial, modern listed company, trust-first but visually distinctive

color_palette.notes: Teal/green is primary. Blue is secondary only. User prefers more green, less blue. Use gradient sparingly for hero backgrounds and accent moments.

typography.headline: Inter or similar clean sans-serif, 700-800 weight, tight tracking for impact
typography.mono_stats: tabular numerals for capacities, dates, and KPIs

layout_principles: Bento grid for stats, KPIs, and data-dense sections -- not just text blocks
Split layouts with media on one side, copy on the other
Frosted glass cards for key proof points (backdrop-filter: blur, subtle border)
Generous whitespace with clear section rhythm
Every page shows at least one concrete proof layer: capacity, years, process, geography
Real photography only -- plant, control room, operators, lab, packaging, logistics
Interactive value chain diagram on homepage (not a flat image)

interactive_elements.value_chain: Interactive horizontal flow: OX -> PA -> Downstreams. Hover reveals byproducts (MA, BA) branching off. Animated on scroll.
interactive_elements.stat_counters: Animated number counters on scroll for key stats (270K MTPA, 5 plants, 30+ years, ~50% share)
interactive_elements.stock_ticker: Live IGPL stock price on investor page via Yahoo Finance API, with timestamp
interactive_elements.scroll_reveal: Sections fade/slide in on scroll. Not excessive -- subtle, 0.5s ease transitions
interactive_elements.nav_behavior: Sticky header, solid background after scroll, subtle shadow on scroll

frosted_glass_usage.when: Hero overlays, stat cards on image backgrounds, key proof point cards
frosted_glass_usage.style: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 12px;
frosted_glass_usage.constraint: Use sparingly -- not every card. Only where it adds depth over imagery.

bento_grid_usage.when: Stats sections, product portfolio overview, investor KPIs, manufacturing strengths
bento_grid_usage.style: Asymmetric grid (e.g., 1 large + 2 small, or 2x2 with one spanning). Each cell is a frosted or solid card.
bento_grid_usage.constraint: Keep grid items data-driven, not decorative.

header.initial_state: transparent over hero, solid white after scroll with shadow

must_include: Corporate office: 401-404, Raheja Centre, 214 Nariman Point, Mumbai 400021

buttons.primary: solid teal (#007C66), white text, subtle rounded corners

card_styles.default: white bg, subtle border, 12px radius, soft shadow on hover
card_styles.frosted: frosted glass style as defined above
card_styles.dark: dark bg (#1E293B), light text, for contrast sections

must_repeat: India's leading manufacturer of Phthalic Anhydride
Strategically located near JNPT / western India chemical belt
Supplies downstream plasticizers, coatings, resins, and specialty chemicals
writing_rules: Every major page needs at least one section explaining why IGPL matters in the value chain
Short paragraphs, scannable bullets, stat bands
Sentence case, not ALL CAPS except in technical tables
seo_rules: Page titles and H1s map to real user queries
Structured FAQ blocks on product pages
Organization, Product, BreadcrumbList, FAQ, ContactPoint schema
Important facts in visible HTML, not only images or PDFs
Consistent entity naming: IG Petrochemicals Ltd. (IGPL)

routing.products: Overview with cards linking to dedicated detail pages
routing.investors: Main hub plus subpages for reports/governance/shareholder info
routing.careers: Role families plus optional openings feed

build_order: 1. Design system (colors, typography, component styles) as CSS variables
2. Homepage (hero, stat strip, value chain, why_igpl, products, manufacturing, careers, contact CTA)
4. Products overview + Phthalic Anhydride detail page

tech_notes.framework: Static HTML + CSS + vanilla JS. No framework needed for this scope.
tech_notes.images: All existing images in repo. Optimize with next-gen formats (WebP) where possible.
tech_notes.performance: Target <3s LCP. Lazy-load below-fold images. Minimize JS.
tech_notes.deployment: Vercel static deploy with existing GitHub repo. vercel.json already configured.

instructions_to_builder.summary: Build a premium industrial corporate website. Trust and clarity first, visual distinction second. Use teal/green as primary color. Bento grids for data. Frosted glass sparingly. Real images only. Animated counters for stats. Interactive value chain.
non_negotiables: Most important IGPL facts above the fold on homepage
Do not bury Phthalic Anhydride behind vague corporate language
Do not show incomplete sections as 'coming soon'
Use real proof points and strong information hierarchy
Every page scannable on desktop and mobile
Teal (#007C66) is primary color, not blue
Numbers animate on scroll for key stats
Value chain is interactive, not a flat image
